tree.setup: The neighborhood committee organizes a community clean-up day. You meet your neighbor, Uncle Deng, while picking up trash in the park.
tree.setup_zh: 社区居委会组织大扫除。你在公园捡垃圾时遇到了邻居邓叔叔。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你也来参加大扫除啦！真好，年轻人能参加，我们都很高兴。这边的垃圾有点多，我们一起捡吧。
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yě lái cānjiā dà sǎochú la! Zhēn hǎo, niánqīng rén néng cānjiā, wǒmen dōu hěn gāoxìng. Zhè biān de lājī yǒudiǎn duō, wǒmen yīqǐ jiǎn ba.
turns.text_en: You came for the clean-up too! Great — we're all happy when young people join. There's quite a bit of trash over here, let's pick it up together.

options.text_zh: 当然来了！大家一起动手，公园很快就干净了。邓叔叔，您每次都参加吗？
options.text_pinyin: Dāngrán lái le! Dàjiā yīqǐ dòngshǒu, gōngyuán hěn kuài jiù gānjìng le. Dèng shūshu, nín měi cì dōu cānjiā ma?
options.text_en: Of course! With everyone working together, the park will be clean in no time. Uncle Deng, do you come every time?
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and shows respect for his regular participation.

options.text_en: The neighborhood committee told me to come.
options.feedback: Makes it sound forced rather than voluntary.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 每次都来！这个公园我天天在这里散步，当然要维护好。你看，捡完以后是不是漂亮多了？
turns.text_pinyin: Měi cì dōu lái! Zhège gōngyuán wǒ tiāntiān zài zhèlǐ sànbù, dāngrán yào wéihù hǎo. Nǐ kàn, jiǎn wán yǐhòu shì bú shì piàoliang duō le?
turns.text_en: Every time! I walk in this park every day, so of course I want to keep it nice. Look — isn't it much prettier after cleaning up?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the results of the clean-up.

options.text_zh: 确实！干净的公园让人心情都变好了。邓叔叔，您对这个社区真用心。我以后也常来帮忙。
options.text_pinyin: Quèshí! Gānjìng de gōngyuán ràng rén xīnqíng dōu biàn hǎo le. Dèng shūshu, nín duì zhège shèqū zhēn yòngxīn. Wǒ yǐhòu yě cháng lái bāngmáng.
options.text_en: Definitely! A clean park lifts everyone's spirits. Uncle Deng, you really care about this community. I'll come help more often too.
options.feedback: Appreciative and commits to future involvement.

options.text_pinyin: Rénmen bù yīnggāi luàn rēng lājī.
options.feedback: Complains rather than appreciates the effort.

tree.cultural_note: Community clean-up days (大扫除) are organized regularly in Chinese neighborhoods. Active participation shows community spirit. Elders who regularly volunteer earn deep respect. The phrase 「用心」 (to put one's heart into something) is a meaningful compliment.
